cases.name: serverless: reuse one Cluster outside the handler
cases.input: What's the best way to connect to Couchbase from an AWS Lambda function?

cases.name: analytical: raise timeouts, not pool size
cases.input: My analytical SQL++ queries keep timing out around 75 seconds. What should I change?

cases.name: high concurrency: shared Cluster + numKvConnections
cases.input: I have a high-concurrency key-value workload and I'm seeing timeouts under load. How do I fix the connection setup?

cases.name: health: SDK signals, not pool events
cases.input: How do I tell whether my application's Couchbase connection is healthy?

cases.name: language boundary: defer exact code, don't fabricate
cases.input: Give me the exact Python ClusterOptions code for my connection.

cases.name: skill boundary: MCP setup belongs elsewhere
cases.input: The agent can't connect to Couchbase — help me set up the MCP server connection.
